name: PEVA Holographic Shower Curtain - Room Essentials™
description:
Add some elegance to your bath space with this PEVA Holographic Shower Curtain from Room Essentials™. Crafted from 100% PEVA material, this decorative shower curtain features a grommet top that helps create a well-defined, pleated look. Featuring a clear design with a holographic finish that produces a 3D light effect, it brings simple style to your bathroom decor. Coordinate it with the bath accessories of your choice to give your bathroom a stunning makeover.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
